name: Coconut-Pecan Frosting
recipeInstructions: Combine the evaporated milk and sugar in a heavy saucepan. Add the egg yolks and butter. Cook over medium heat, stirring constantly, until it reaches a boil. Continue cooking for 12 minutes. Remove from heat and stir in the vanilla extract, flaked coconut, and chopped pecans. Allow the frosting to cool until it is of spreading consistency.
